remarks: Fantastic location! Walk to South Norwalk train, shops, movie theater, restaurants and SoNo Collection Mall and from this charming Victorian two-family home with water view of the Long Island Sound. This 5-bedroom, 3 full bath two-level apartment has many special features. There is a large, bright and sunny living room with a ceiling fan. The kitchen has granite countertops and is equipped with a refrigerator, dishwasher, gas range & microwave. The primary bedroom has a full bath and door to the balcony with views of the Long Island Sound. There are two additional bedrooms & a full bath on this level. Upstairs, you'll find two more bedrooms and another full bath. Laundry. Enjoy high-efficiency central gas heating & central air-conditioning system. There is a large patio for outdoor dining, a spacious backyard with room for a private garden and off-street, assigned parking for 2 cars. There is on street parking as well. A storage shed is available for an additional fee. The listing broker is an owner.
